name: AI Appointment Setter & Lead Follow-Up System for Cleaning Businesses

options.responseData: {"success":true,"message":"Lead received. CleanPro will contact you shortly."}

parameters.content:
Automatically captures cleaning-business leads, normalizes form data, scores each lead, sends the correct response email, writes to Google Sheets, creates follow-up tasks, and updates a CRM pipeline tab. Before activating, replace/verify the Google Sheets document ID and reconnect SMTP/Google credentials.

Google Calendar node is ENABLED. Connect a Google Calendar OAuth credential in n8n before activating the workflow. Events are created only when Preferred Schedule can be parsed as a date/time.

Google Sheets node compatibility fix: all Sheets nodes now use Document = By ID and Sheet = By Name. If you copied/converted the workbook to a new Google Sheet, replace the Document ID in every Google Sheets node with your current spreadsheet ID. Sheet names must remain exactly: Leads, Follow Up Tasks, CRM Pipeline.

nodes.name: README - Google Sheets Sheet Field Fix
